name: io.github.Servosity/connectwise-automate-mcp
title: ConnectWise Automate MCP
description: Sync your ConnectWise Automate fleet to local SQLite and answer cross-client RMM questions offline.

environmentVariables.name: CONNECTWISE_AUTOMATE_SERVER
environmentVariables.description: Your Automate host, e.g. company.hostedrmm.com (endpoint base URL).

environmentVariables.name: CONNECTWISE_AUTOMATE_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Registered integration clientId GUID, sent as the clientId header (required for v2020.11+).

environmentVariables.name: CONNECTWISE_AUTOMATE_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for the ConnectWise Automate API (short-lived; mint with apitoken mint).
